examples: Thee second, new class will be Multirole Fighters.
The Sukhoi Su-35 is a single-seat, twin-engined supermaneuverability multirole fighter.
Nowhere are the advances in this multirole combat fighter more starkly illustrated than in the cockpit.
At altitude, its top speed is Mach 2.25 compared to Mach 2 for the U.S. F-16 Fighting Falcon, another multirole fighter aircraft made by General Dynamics and Lockheed Martin.
